title: Find and read the production report entries
description: Use function code #750 to read the content of the production report. A. Use with 0x6B and 0x6C to read the content of the latest production report. Modbus (Hex) Tool 1 / Tool 2 common status R/W 6B Current No. of production report entries (L) R 6C Current No. of production report entries (H) R B. Read the content of history report entries . ◼ When the version number is 0:
